creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #25)

Add bofh@ (maintainer of devel/py-buildbot*) to CC List.

> ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}buildbot-www>=${PORTVERSION}<${PORTVERSION}_99:devel/py-buildbot-www@${PY_FLAVOR}

It is based on the assumption that buildbot requires buildbot-www of exactly the same version. But in this case, I guess >=${PORTVERSION} is enough.
